title: Ominous Vault God Drops
description: Stupidly OP Ominous Vault loot with a decent % chance! Enjoy <3
body:
Maces. Notches, and Tridents, oh my! 
Have you ever wanted to be set for life by simply completing a Trial Chamber? 
Well, here's your chance!
This is "Stupidly OP Ominous Vault loot" with a decent % chance! Enjoy :)
Don't be rude, credit meh <3
